title: pectocarya heterocarpa
intro: Pectocarya heterocarpa, also known as whiskerling, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). Traditionally, Pectocarya heterocarpa has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Pectocarya heterocarpa can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
